'''Onoma''' was the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[MC80B Star Cruiser]] ''[[Mon Remonda]]''. He led the warship in the [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|Liberation of Coruscant]], where he captured the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Triumph (Victory-class)|''Triumph'']].

Onoma was in command of the ''Mon Remonda'' during the campaign to hunt [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]] up until its destruction at the [[Battle of Calamari]] at the hands of ''[[Silencer-7]]''. He, along with the rest of the crew, perished.<ref name="TEGtVaV"></ref>
